name: 'O'ole Tatu
description: An extremely painful full-body tatu, the ‘O’ole Tatu even covers the face, scalp and genitals. The pattern is an intricate one made of pentagons (resembling a crab’s shell), and socially it signifies a powerful and loyal warrior. Once the tatu has healed from being given, the wearer gains five soak dice that even work against Aggravated damage, but has a penalty of 1 to all social rolls. Pattern-Ripping Claws

name: 3-Dim Sonographic Sense Factory
description: A circuit board that requires a decent computer and a sound system to work, it creates “sonographic imag- es.” Success on an Arete roll causes it to produce two sets of sound waves and convert one into light, creat- ing images that appear to be three dimensional ab- Other Wonders which are not unique but are often strange, those that manipulate Space and Time and finally the Unique and Special Items that not only defy classification but also often are impossible to rec- reate. Sound stracts sculptures that manage to look just like the music sounds. Ebon Candles of Manifest Nigrescence

name: Abh-t Dagger
description: Granted when they complete their first hunt, the Abh-t Dagger is a knife wielded by a Hem-ka Sobk. It is ornately carved but has a rough surface on the flat of other weapons have been enhanced consistently throughout history. This chapter is broken into sections based on what the weapon is: Blades, Defenses, Firearms, and Other. the blade. It inflicts Aggravated damage, even to spirits, as it is blessed by Sobk for use in removing the heart and liver from the dead. In combat, it is difficulty 4, Strength +1 (aggravated), Conceal P. Assassin’s Blade

name: Abundanti's Oil
description: An extremely flammable oil, it is used by Daedaleans for many things. Among those uses are lighting lamps, making explosives, stoking furnaces, lubricating clock- work and even as a fuel for more complex machines. Mages of all sorts craft for their use, and the use of those Sleepers who work with them and need an edge. The three classifications of Wonders underneath Engineering and Materials are those used for or the products of Enlightened Chemistry, objects of Crea- tion and Destruction, and Improved Instruments. Chemistry When a full barrel explodes, it does 15-20 dice of fire damage and burns for over an hour. The Black Cauldron

name: Accelerated Force Cannon (AFC)
description: A tree-limb that, when activated by a spoken com- mand, will sprout seven magical lotus blossoms to block attacks targeting the holder. Activating it for a turn costs two Quintessence and gives the holder three soak dice, even against Aggravated damage, though only from attacks in the direction that the Branch is being held in. Silver Fan

name: Advanced Bugs
description: They come in two varieties: audio only and video. The audio bug is the size of a grain of rice whereas the video one is the size of a pea. Both transmit audio and GPS information, but the video bug also sends color video in the direction its facing (and can manage black So, this chapter is divided into four sections, the first is about Bugs and Drones usually used for surveil- lance. The second, fittingly, is Countersurveillance. The remaining Wonders are split between Divination and other sorts of Supernatural Perception. Drones and white in anything short of perfect darkness). Both last for 24 hours without a power hookup. AUAV

name: Adze Unparalleled, The
description: This rod, usually in the form of a cane, walking stick or, more rarely, a riding crop, can drain the Quintes- sence out of a non-living object up to the size of a large van causing it to disintegrate to nothing. The user touches the rod to an item and it makes an Arete roll, difficulty 7. One success can destroy a large briefcase or all clothing and small gadgets on a person, two can destroy a door, motorcycle, or Iteration X hardsuit, and three or more can destroy a van, limousine or heavy vault door. Each success also fills the rod's peri- apt with a point of Quintessence. Usurer’s Purse

name: Aether Codex, The
description: This chapter is divided into only two parts: Periapts which can store Quintessence and Prime Manipula- tion which helps in the perception and manipulation of Quintessence. A book created by Hermetic scholars that imparts Quintessence while it is read. It is best used for effects focused on knowledge and understanding or the Astral Umbra. Coding Tunes, Vol I

name: Akaa' Et Nuon Ta
description: real part of magickal learning. Some Wonders are used to make learning from books easier. And of course, some can just grant insight directly, without the need for a single written word. This chapter is divided into three parts: Grimoires that can teach magick, Primers that can Awaken Sleepers and Other learning-based Wonders. An obscure text with Akkadian, Greek and Latin versions. Though the original is lost, its title translates to “Cry of the World”, am ill omen recognizable to most Mage. It contains illustrations of deeply perverse acts, albeit ones that will please certain classes of oth- erworldly beings. Those who understand it gain insight into the successions of past worlds and the eventual fate of this one. Can act as the Library background up to level 5, and can teach the Cosmology, Enigmas, Lore (spirits), Met- aphysics and Occult Knowledges. The Alchemy of Unity

name: Alanson Light Hardsuit
description: A bulky suit that can be hidden, just barely, under- warrior carrying it. A properly treated Zulu warshield is large enough and rare enough to draw attention, and is protected by the magick of its construction, giving its wearer an additional soak die and increasing the diffi- culty of an attack against the user by 2. neath a trench coat, the Alanson hardsuit is still obvi- ous and not used for subtle missions, though when not in use it folds up into the size of a suitcase and weighs 70 pounds. It consists of composite body armor with motors to power the joints. It can be customized to look like a space suit, diving suit or military body ar- mor when worn alone, or even a hazmat suit. It pro- vides three dice of armor and a +1 Strength bonus for any non-jumping roll, though it caps the speed of the wearer to 20 yards per turn. Heating and cooling units maintain comfort between 0 and 110 degrees Fahren- heit. The gloves add one to all fist attacks, and can conceal blades to cause Lethal damage instead of bash- ing. To power these functions, only one point of Quintessence per six hours of use are necessary. Whenever an attack penetrates the armor, an Arete Wearables 163 roll is made. On a botch, the suit breaks and shuts down entirely, slowing the wearer to four yards per turn and giving -2 dice to all Strength or Dexterity dice pools. Up to three additional modules can be attached. Alanson R-25 Hardsuit

name: Alanson R-25 Hardsuit
description: Alanson suits are popular among Iteration X field agents. With some minor modifications, they can be used in extreme environments such as space and other dimensions, underwater, and virtually any terrestrial environment. Though older models weigh as much as 70 pounds, modern models such as the R-25 only weigh 30, and without the helmet can be concealed under a long coat. It grants all of the following (those with point costs are additional costs): • Armor 7 soak dice against all damage, -2 dexterity • Strength +2 Strength for anything other than running or jumping. Running is restricted to 20 yards per turn and can only be maintained for one turn per Stam- ina dot. • Temperature Control Comfortable from 0 to 110 F • Hard Fists +1 die of damage to weaponless strikes, bashing by default but lethal if concealed blades are used. • Integrated Communications Interface (ICI) When wearing helmet, provides VDAS, GPS, tele- phone, radio, Internet and video capacity • Cross-Environment Life Support System (CELSS) Sustains wearer in hazmat, underwater, extreme cold or heat, and even the Deep Umbra. Each hour costs 1 Quintessence. • Enhanced Targeting Capacity (ETC) After spending a turn using the targeting system, +4 dice to distance attack dice pools • Heavy Armor +3 soak dice against all damage, decreases running 164 Mystic Armory speed to 10 yards and Dexterity penalty increases to -3. • High-Intensity Plasma Assault Unit (HIPAU) Fires plasma from hands. Costs 1 quintessence and requires a Dexterity + Energy Weapons roll for a six-die Forces 3/Prime 2 attack. This does Aggra- vated damage and is vulgar in most places. • Nanotech Self-Repair Module (NSRM) After rolling Enlightenment (diff 7), the suit can repair minor damage in minutes and major damage in a few hours. A botch can wreck the suit, howev- er. • Self-Contained Emergency Medical System (SCEMS) For a cost of 1 Quintessence, rolls Enlightenment (4) at diff 6 for a Heal Self effect. • Standardized Primal Energy Containment Matrix (SPECM) Allows the storage of an additional 10 points of Quintessence. Up to two may be added to a suit. Armor of Achilles

name: Alchemy of Unity, The
description: Contains the rote Holy Union. Written in Latin script and covered in alchemical symbols that flash through the mind of anyone who sees it even once they have put it down, this Grimoire can only be used by a specific few: the proper Heirs of Heylel, who wrote it. For anyone else, a Perception + Occult roll is needed, and every two successes allow them to take advantage of one level of the Arete that it can teach. Each success also gives one fact about the contents, other than Heylel’s specific insights. • There is a being from beyond the Horizon he calls “the Holy Guardian Angel” or “the Divine Will” • This being is best managed through an ancient version of the Hermetic arts, and cannot be bound by those who use arts it doesn’t approve of • The Grimoire contains the information on how to summon it, but not its True Name • Some part of this being can be absorbed • This being is capable of directly affecting Avatars Though the Holy Union rote containing within is 10 Mystic Armory incomplete, the only remaining piece to finish it is the True Name of the being that it summons. The Asklepian Tractate

name: Alley Shades
description: The head of a fallen friend or a defeated foe can be a potent magickal object, and in ancient Britain and Gaul, they were used for divination. They can be asked yes or no questions about the past or future, and a “yes” is delivered by the box it is in becoming lighter, a “no” by it becoming heavier. A warning: the head, if a their personality does not match well with the ques- tioner, have been known to lie. Sacred Bullhide

name: Annulus Vigil: The Watchful Guardian Ring
description: Particularly common in Tuscany (and even through- out Italy) these golden rings have rubies embedded in them. When in the presence of poison, the rubies glow. They glow more brightly if they’re closer to the poison. This chapter is broken into three sections, the first deals with Accessories, such as jewelry. The second focuses on Armor, both mystical and technological. The final section is about Clothing that has been en- hanced in ways other than being made into armor. Bangles of Infinite Acceptance

name: Anti-Gerasone
description: A water filtration system that is most commonly at- tached to showerheads. So long as it is used daily, the their users, and then there are the ones that will ma- nipulate the fundamental forces of nature themselves. This chapter is broken up into Wonders that make use of techniques of Advanced Biology, those that give the user a Boost, the fruits of Medical Science, more Mystic Healing, and finally those that manipulate the fundamental forces of Nature, both living and nonliv- ing. Biology user will not age, though even a single day lapse will cause them to revert to their true age at a rate of one year per day without treatment. Bio-Printer

name: Aole Koheoheo Tatu
description: A black circle on the sternum, this tatu protects against poison, giving five automatic successes on soak rolls against poisons and venoms of all sorts. He'e Tatu

name: Arachne's Web
description: A companion to the Wings of Icarus, Arachne's Web is a system of strings and pulleys attached to the kite that allow it to be maneuvered much more easily. If the pilot botches an Arete roll, then the companion controlling the Web may make one (difficulty 8) to keep them in the air. ELMART

name: ARC-2
description: The ARC (Advanced Rotor-Craft) is the deadliest combat helicopter on Earth. An Iteration X design, it flies low and fast (avoiding radar) to destroy its targets and escape quickly. It is 60 feet long and 12 feet wide, Transit and Communication 125 extended to 28 feet by its weapons platforms, and 50 feet by the diameter of the top rotor. The armaments include a 30mm chain gun with 1500 rounds mounted to the bottom of the ARC to allow for 360 degrees of fire, 24 “Inferno” missiles (12 on each side), 8 three inch rockets (4 on each side), and a “Bambi” automatic grenade launcher with 200 rounds (on the turret below the ARC.) It carries a pilot and a gunner, though it has autopi- lot capabilities when necessary. The targeting computer provides night vision and other sensors, the ARC is shaped for stealth (avoiding radar) and it has a Forces effect keeping it completely silent. The ARC-2 has enough fuel to travel 800 miles and can achieve 350 mph. Artificer's Badger

name: Armor
description: A bulky suit that can be hidden, just barely, under- warrior carrying it. A properly treated Zulu warshield is large enough and rare enough to draw attention, and is protected by the magick of its construction, giving its wearer an additional soak die and increasing the diffi- culty of an attack against the user by 2. neath a trench coat, the Alanson hardsuit is still obvi- ous and not used for subtle missions, though when not in use it folds up into the size of a suitcase and weighs 70 pounds. It consists of composite body armor with motors to power the joints. It can be customized to look like a space suit, diving suit or military body ar- mor when worn alone, or even a hazmat suit. It pro- vides three dice of armor and a +1 Strength bonus for any non-jumping roll, though it caps the speed of the wearer to 20 yards per turn. Heating and cooling units maintain comfort between 0 and 110 degrees Fahren- heit. The gloves add one to all fist attacks, and can conceal blades to cause Lethal damage instead of bash- ing. To power these functions, only one point of Quintessence per six hours of use are necessary. Whenever an attack penetrates the armor, an Arete Wearables 163 roll is made. On a botch, the suit breaks and shuts down entirely, slowing the wearer to four yards per turn and giving -2 dice to all Strength or Dexterity dice pools. Up to three additional modules can be attached. Alanson R-25 Hardsuit

name: Armor of Achilles
description: Made with many brass components, the Armor of Achilles looks archaic, almost Classical. However, it is obviously more, with wheels on the feet and levers and springs on the joints. These mechanisms react to the slightest motion of the wearer to speed up movement. Activating it takes a full turn and costs a point of Quintessence, and then it rolls its Arete, successes are needed for duration and extra actions. Bulletproof Hoodie

name: Artificer's Badger
description: A tunneling machine with a steam-engine for power. It is a two person vehicle, lit by a lamp powered by Abundanti’s Oil. If the pilot does not personally ar- range something, the Badger does not automatically circulate fresh air, and so can be quite dangerous. It costs on Quintessence (in the form of high grade coal) to run the machine for an hour, and after each use, it requires days of maintenance. Through soft earth it can move at 10 yards/turn, but the harder it is the slower it moves. It is stopped dead by granite, though. Aurora Transatmospheric Fighter

name: Asklepian Tractate, The
description: This book contains the herbal lore and magick of Asklepios, a great healer and purported son of Apollo himself. It is valued particularly by Verbena and Her- metics for its insights in these areas (and of course, the different insights taken away by the two groups is a source of friction). It can be used to learn Arete 2 and Life 3. The Black Bible

name: Assassin’s Blade
description: A short dagger used by House Janissary of the Order of Hermes before its destruction (now, most are still in the hands of the Order, but some are possessed by the Euthanatos), it can be used as a normal dagger. How- ever, it can also be wielded with a Perception + Medi- cine roll, which gets a -3 difficulty, ignores armor and can target anyone within line of sight with a called shot. If used in this way, it stabs a person from the inside using Correspondence and Life magicks, but if they die, it repairs the body with Matter to leave no 134 Mystic Armory mark. Legend has it that there is a more powerful ver- sion which cleans up resonance, so that even Mages investigating the death will not be aware that anything supernatural has occurred. Blood Kris

name: Astral Tiki
description: Carved from a black hardwood with green glass or gems for the eyes, these carvings of humans are usually a squat figure about a foot high. In the area with its with large teeth and binding a hunger spirit into it. Anything trapped inside is released if the top is re- moved. It can trap a number of ghosts equal to its Gnosis. The lantern rolls gnosis against the target’s Willpower, and if successful holds the ghost until it is released, the jack-o’-lantern rots away, or a month passes, whichever is first. Spiritus Pastille

name: AUAV
description: The Advanced Unmanned Aerial Vehicle is a joint Void Engineer/Iteration X project. It’s a robot plane that can fly at Mach 20 (the fastest mundane plane on Earth, the X-15, flies at Mach 6.7). Shorter and slim- mer than a standard fighter due to a lack of a cockpit, it is also a stealth fighter that absorbs radar. It has a dozen air-to-air missiles mounted on it, but its main purpose is reconnaissance, and it has a sophisticated array of sensors and cameras to aid in this task. BioSpy

name: Aurora Transatmospheric Fighter
description: A jet aircraft that moves at speeds a bit higher than Mach 5 when necessary. It is weighed down a bit by Primium armor, but the engines are nuclear to provide the amount of power it requires. To manage it, the Pilot must be both very skilled and hooked in to neural interface. This allows them to manage a pair of 30mm chain guns, a forward plasma ejector, 16 air-to- air smart Hunter missiles and four Primally powered 126 Mystic Armory neutron air-to-surface missiles. Each of those four mis- siles is overkill in all but the most severe situations. Only a half dozen or so exist and they are constantly being repaired due to their experimental nature. Bird of Reason

name: Auspicious Sistrum
description: Pocket Poltergeist

name: Bafflejack
description: A bafflejack is a small Talisman or Device, usually in the form of jewelry, clothing, accessories, etc., that makes it harder for the holder to be surveilled. They contain a Forces 2 effect that scrambles light, sound and electricity that interacts with the wearer and Mind 2 effect that blurs perceptions. This functions as a temporary Arcane background for the wearer. For each success on the Talisman’s Arete, difficulty 7, any- one affected by the Mind sphere suffers a -1 to Percep- tion rolls towards the wearer. For each dot of the bafflejack, it provides one of electronic, light, sound or mental dampening. Each point of quintessence can fuel the effects for an hour. Sensitive security zones for the Technocracy can detect a bafflejack with success on five dice at difficulty five, but are too expensive to put in most places. Communications Jammer

name: Barrel Improvements
description: Any of several improvements to a gun’s barrel, all require a point of Quintessence from the device it is attached to for each shot: • Advanced Barrel Coating - All rifles have an inner coating, but this improved one gives a difficulty de- crease of 1 on attacks (particularly at long range). • Cryotreatment - Mechanically similar to Advanced Barrel Coating, but achieved by using extreme cold to eliminate barrel imperfections. • Polygonal Rifling - Though the standard is a square, polygonal rifling fits the bullet better, thus using the force more effectively. This adds one damage die on a successful attack. Blast Pistol

name: Battle Homunculus
description: Iteration X has its HIT Marks, the Progenitors have Battle Homunculi. Vat grown and genetically engi- neers to be some of the best warriors in the world, they come in many shapes. They have several properties in common: This chapter breaks into three sections. Artificial Beings covers any form of life or intelligence created by Mages whereas Ghosts and Spirits both deal with Wonders concerning them. Beings • Acute senses • Tough skin • Precision control over their cells allowing them to repair damage • Redundant organs • Intelligent, but usually naive There are several common models: • Joes - Humaniform, these can be Average, Line- backer of Kid models, who looks normal, large and like a child. They are strong, have infrared and ul- traviolet vision and an extended auditory range, in- cluding some radio transmissions. Finally, they are armed with bone claws that can be extruded from their fingers, so that they can do Lethal damage in combat. • Fluffies - These are horrors out of Lovecraft: proto- 102 Mystic Armory plasmic, tentacles, many-eyes. They are extremely ef- fective in combat, both unnerving their enemies and able to use their tentacles, claws and fangs to good effect in combat. • Fidos - Engineered to look like small animals, often pets, they are often particularly cute examples of the species they look like. They are stronger, faster and tougher than normal animals, and this allows them to go places humans sometimes can’t. The Bioroid Eva

name: Beast Cloak
description: Made from the full pelt of a large animal with a spir- it of such an animal bound into it, when worn, a Beast Cloak allows the wearer to take on the shape of the animal. 170 Mystic Armory over six months to craft (rendering it outrageously expensive) and weighs over 60 pounds, the armor is far less unwieldy than most plate. It provides an armor rating of 8, a Divine Aura (rolled with the armor’s arete) and reduces Perception and Dexterity by two when worn. It takes about fifteen minutes to put on or take off, and is custom made and will fit almost no one other than the person it is created for. Void Engineer Light Environment Suit

name: Bilateral Pattern-Fusion Suit
description: A two for two made of vinyl, it contains straps that bind the two Mages wearing it together by an arm and a leg. Golden buckles secure the suit and then it is locked together. It cannot be removed without either the key or destroying the suit, and destroying it in- volves pulling apart the two users who have been bound together metaphysically (which causes five Ag- 96 Mystic Armory • Spirit warning In all cases, a Perception + Awareness roll allows them to perceive something they normally wouldn't. gravated damage to each of them). When worn, the suit entwines the two Patterns, so that any Effect that affects one will affect the other equally. Wearing the suit for more than 24 hours is difficult, though 24 hours is necessary for the suit to activate, and results in a bond for 2-3 days after remov- ing it. On repeated use, mannerisms start to transfer between the users and they begin to be more capable of finishing each other’s sentences or sharing thoughts without trying, and they become more and more ob- sessed with one another. After wearing the suit together for 24 hours, it rolls Arete (difficulty 9). On a success, any sensation or alteration that affects one will affect the other for a full week, including emotional extremes, telepathy, Quin- tessence, Paradox, and damage. A failure creates an emotional bond, but no mystic sharing. A botch merg- es the two into one flesh, destroying the suit and re- quiring a extremes of Life magick to ever be separated again. Hephaistos' Tables

name: Bio-Printer
description: A two foot by two foot by two-foot cube that weighs about forty pounds, the bio-printer can create synthetic flesh. Usually it is used to make high-fidelity replicas and replacement parts but can also create novel parts. One Quintessence will provide flesh worth one Health Level. Cloning Devices

name: Biological Dislocator
description: The Biological Dislocator allows the clean removal of limbs without severing blood vessels or nerves. This allows the doctor to perform an operation without the risk of bleeding out or infection that would normally be present. One point of Quintessence preserves the limb for an hour. Life Procedures are necessary for full reattachment, the Dislocator can’t do it on its own. It CAN be used in combat, but it only does four dice of damage, can only be used at very close range, and +2 difficulty to hit. Dr. Day's Hypodermic

name: Biomesh Armor
description: Nanotech altered skin-cells, this armor is protective but non-obvious. For every two points spent, the oper- ative gains one die of armor that can soak against any damage. It must be repaired and maintained between missions and is useless after a week of sustained vio- lence. It may be bought as a biomod, but costs two extra points and can regenerate itself when the owner eats a high iron, high calcium diet. Body-Forger's Arm

name: Bioroid Eva, The
description: Not so much a wonder as a thinking being, the peak of what a Cybernaut roboticist can create. She has a kind and warm personality, enjoys playing chess, and has only resorted to violence in self-defense, despite how good she is at it. She was made from pieces of several hundred bodies, though her pieces fit together without stitches or bolts. Over that is an exoskeleton of steel and brass with an art deco style. It can be removed, but without it she would damage herself if she used her extreme strength. Since the Reckoning, she has been babbling in strange languages and suffering seizures, though the scientists who study her cannot determine the cause, as her skull is hollow and lined with gold circuitry. Creating a being like Eve requires Entropy 5, Life 5, Mind 3, Prime 5, and Spirit 4. All her Attributes are at 5 except Strength which is 7, and her brain is a Platon- ic copy of her creator’s, made from pure quintessence and drawing a signal from the Astral Umbra. Some- thing has happened to this brain, though what is left up to the Storyteller. Coco Macaque

name: BioSpy
description: A small mass that resembles scar tissue, about the size of a quarter. When stuck to a target, it inserts small probe and records their sensory impressions: what they see, hear and feel, and to a lesser extent what they think. It encodes this into a DNA sequence which is stored in the tissue. When sprayed with a special compound, it falls off and can be retrieved by the Pro- genitors along with the recorded data. It causes no discomfort when in use, only recording data. The Black Rat's Rats

name: Biotemporal Maintenance Field Generator
description: A strange, clockwork backpack that was discovered shortly after the Avatar Storm hit. It has eight append- ages giving it a spider-like appearance, each with rather menacing looking tools attached to it. When idle, it ticks, but when worn by a Mage, it creates quick racket and glows dully. It plunges its limbs into the Mage’s flesh (causing 1 level of unsoakable Lethal damage which cannot be healed without removing the device). It prevents Disembodiment and Acclimation for a week while worn in exchange for an unsoakable and unhealable aggravated health level. Branch of the World Tree

name: Bird of Reason
description: A steam-powered ornithopter that can hold two: a pilot and a passenger (two small passengers are possible as well). In the Dark Fantastick, this is quite vulgar. It burns one Quintessence every three minutes and can move at 9 yards/turn. It has an Armor rating of 3, but no built-in weapons. Black Helicopters

name: Bird Staff of Osanyin
description: A staff of iron with a bird figuring at the top, sym- bolizing the Yoruba legend that Osanyin’s priests’ spir- its become birds when they die. The holder gains three ranks of the Dream background, and for the higher cost, the staff will act as a small periapt. Fencing Square

name: Black Bible, The
description: The inverted gospels of The Black Bible are deliber- ately blasphemous against Christianity, pushing a Lu- ciferian Satanism that goes far beyond modern provoc- ative variants. Able to teach secret Occult knowledge, including Cosmology, Enigmas, Spirit Lore and Meta- physics, this book is by itself capable of acting as a Library background of 1. The Black Book of Manu

name: Black Book of Manu, The
description: Passed from Angra Manyu to the first magus, this is a collection of Persian litanies describing the enigma of the Absolute poetically. The Black Book can act as the Library background up to level 3, and can teach the Cosmology, Enigmas, Lore (spirits), Metaphysics and Occult Knowledges. The Book of Shadows of Maeve McKinnon

name: Black Cauldron, The
description: Forced with mysterious metals and cast with Aesfotedia, this is a gigantic pot large enough to boil a human being, but light enough to be moved by a single elderly woman. When empty, it is capable of flight (at nearly 20 mph!) when containing its owner. However, most use if that the Cauldron can instantly fill itself with water and empty itself into thirteen jugs and is perfect place for brewing. However, it only works at night, and if it is flying when church bells ring, it falls out of the air. The Bond of ibn Daud

name: Black Helicopters
description: No normal helicopters, the Black Helicopters used by the New World Order are designed to be incon- spicuous: the eye just passes over them, the engines are silenced. This is accomplished through an effective Arcane rating of 5: they have countersensors that wipe out all perception of them in real-time, with an Arete roll (difficulty 6) necessary to activate. While a small fraction of the fleet has Primium, most use a counter procedure array to resist magick with their own Arete. There is also a system to scramble the readings of elec- tronic monitoring systems while maintaining Enlight- ened Science based sensors for Correspondence, Forc- es, Life, Prime, Dimensional Science and Time anoma- lies. Safe Speed: 200 mph, Max Speed 500 mph, Maneu- verability 10, Crew 4, Armor 10, Weapons 2 30mm cannons, two 2.75” rockets with eight rockets each Clockwork Sycamore

name: Black Rat's Rats, The
description: 42 Mystic Armory Radio controlled rats based on a comic book. They make excellent spies, transmitting what they see and hear (though it does come from a rat’s perspective). They are obviously mechanical, and thus need to stay in shadows to avoid detection. Fortunately, they have a Stealth dice pool of 6, matching their Perception dice pool. They tend to break when discovered for what a they are. Cauldron of Spies

name: Blade-Blaster Brand Rocket Blades
description: The coolest inline skates around, Blade-Blasters have mini-thrusters in them allowing the user to hit 200 mph with only 20 feet for acceleration. Extremely dan- gerous, especially to those with less than a 3 in Athlet- ics, a Dexterity + Athletics roll at difficulty 6 is neces- sary just to remain upright at 150 mph. Stunts usually require even harder rolls, and botches can cause some serious damage to the user. Thrust lasts for one turn (or one minute) per Quintessence. Demon Mask

name: Blast Pistol
description: Coming in a wide variety of appearances, these weapons are common among Etherites, Virtual Adepts and Technocrats alike. It fires a Forces 2/Prime 2 ef- fect that hits on a Dexterity + Firearms roll, which can be dodged. Each shot uses up a point of Quintessence. Cascade 23 Laser Pistol

name: Block Party Videos
description: A video store (moving to streaming in the modern world) that rents out videos with subliminal messages in this. This can slowly turn people in the direction that the Syndicate and New World Order want them to go. The costs reflect those of a single such video. Bond Fine Tobacco Products

name: Blood Kris
description: A wavy-bladed dagger/short-sword from Indonesia and Malaysia. The Kris does Strength + 2 damage, and has four powers Tuju “Sorcery by Pointing”: spending 1 quintes- sence, the wielder can do the Kris’s damage to anyone they can see within 20 meters (diff 7 on Arete) Some blades can, for 4 quintessence, harm anyone by stabbing their footprint Song of the Sarong: The Kris rattles in its sheath (sa- rong) if danger is nearby, more strongly for greater and closer danger. This only works against personal threats to the owner. The Silver Dance: Rolling Arete against difficulty 7, the spirit of the Kris, called a hantu, animates the weapon and it can attack on its own, with relevant statistics equal to the owner’s. Indonesian Chicken Soup: For two Quintessence an arete roll at difficulty 7 made while polishing the han- dle with special oil, it transforms the oil into potent and preventative medicine. A Blood Kris, however, may turn on its owner. If the wielder fails a roll, the Kris rolls Arete against difficulty 9. A success causes it to stab the owner for Strength + 2 damage, or triggering one of its powers at the wield- er. On a botch of any ability, this happens automatical- ly. Chango's Blade

name: Body-Forger's Arm
description: 60 Mystic Armory a scene, two or more for a day, and one additional success is needed to transform the Mage’s belongings as well. Totem Tattoo

name: Bolingbroke's Cathedra
description: This unique Talisman cannot simply be bought. It consists of the ritual items of Roger Bolingbroke bani Tytalus. The primary item, though is the Golden Ca- thedra, a wooden chair painted with mystic sigils and with copper images and swords hung from it. When in use, the owner gains the benefits of: • Arcane 5 • A Farsight rote at Arete 5 • Mercury’s Bridge rote at Arete 5 • Ward rote at Arete 5 • Spirit Wall rote at Arete 5 Rumor has it that the chair contains a malevolent spirit that demands blood whenever the magicks are used. Extraction Device

name: Bond Watch, The
description: A customizable smart watch available to members of the New World Order. Among the usual abilities it has are: • tracking a signal • a miniature circular saw to cut through ropes and cables • small laser • communications • EM Field • electric shock through the faceplate Each function can be used with a single Quintes- sence and an Arete roll. Clockers

name: Bone Spurs
description: 54 Mystic Armory The biomod gives the owner exposed bits of bone, no more than an inch in length. Usually, they can be extended or retracted at will. These bone spurs do damage at Strength + 1 Lethal damage, and when any attacked makes physical contact, the Scientist rolls Stamina + Survival and on a success causes 1 Lethal damage. Chitin

name: Book of Shadows of Maeve McKinnon, The
description: Almost exclusively used by Verbena, the Book of Shadows is a personal mystical journal. It chronicles the life of Maeve McKinnon from unAwakened young girl all the way to Verbena Master. The book is huge, three feet high by two feet wide and a full five inches thick, with pages of vellum and a black leather cover over brass. The lock on the book requires either the key or a magickal effect of at least rank 4. The reader can learn Arete 3, Entropy 2, Forces 3 and Life 3, and upon completion, gains a dot of Fairy Lore and one of Wraith Lore. The Cloud Dance of Eternal Vision and Joy

name: Bottle of Fire
description: A four-inch-tall red glass bottle with a brass stopper. When unstoppered and turned upside down, the user rolls Arete (difficulty 7). Until the Mage stoppers the bottle again, the fire that pours out spreads at one foot per turn and causes damage to people and objects like a Forces 4 effect. A sufficiently powerful strike will

name: Branch of the World Tree
description: 106 Mystic Armory A powerful wonder created from a branch of the Ax- is Mundi, these Talismans are actually still alive, and vary in potency. To make such a wonder, Life 3/Prime 2/Spirit 2 is needed to keep the branch alive once it is cut from the tree, and Prime 4 can ensure it stays alive without needed to renew the effect, otherwise the wonder loses its power when the branch dies. Additional powers can be given to the branches, but the base levels are as follows, and cumulative: 4 points - The character may move between levels of a the Umbra if they have the ability to do so. It deals Strength in Aggravated damage to spirits 6 points - So long as the character can travel between levels of the Umbra, they can now bring others with them. Strength + 1 Aggravated damage against Spirits 8 points - A character who cannot move through the Umbra can now do so at will (as though with Arete 3), though cannot bring others with them. Strength + 3 Aggravated damage against spirits 10 points - Any character may move themself and any number of companions through the Umbra (with 5 dice of Arete). Strength + 5 Aggravated damage against spirits. Bullroarer

name: Brittany's Music Box
description: A small gold music box with a heart-embossed lid. When opened, it plays a soundtrack that approximates the current mood. It uses one Quintessence per turn. This reduces all difficulties by 1 for the owner’s allies who can hear it and act according to the mood and increases difficulties by 1 for actions that run counter to the mood. Clout Perfume

name: Bulletproof Hoodie
description: Usually bearing stylish logos, occult designs or politi- cal slogans, these hoodies were created in response to the increase in ethnic violence in recent years. Matter 3 has been used to strengthen the cloth while keeping them light weight. The wearer gains four soak dice against lethal slashing or projectile damage, but not against blunt trauma. Deep Space Combat Armor

name: Bullroarer
description: The Bullroarer has a particular resonance for Dreamtime spirits, decreasing the difficulty to sum- mon them by 2. Cloë the Growl-Growl Bear

name: Car
description: Created by an anonymous Virtual Adept, the DDGR (Dirt-DiGgeR) looks like a normal debit card. However, when inserted into an ATM, it fakes creden- tials from the bank’s Board and pulls up information on sketchy activities that the bank and its customers have been involved in the last week, then prints them to the receipt. This is accomplished by a Da- ta/Forces/Mind effect and uses the card’s Arete vs. difficulty of 7. Each success uncovers one nasty deed and the guilty parties. This is a coincidental effect un- less a Sleeper who doesn’t know what the DDGR is for sees the receipt. Then, it causes three Paradox and often a call to the police. The card works only once. Identification

name: Carte Blanche
description: A blank white credit card with a magnetic strip, the Carte Blanche will function in any ATM and then erase the transaction afterwards, allowing the user to withdraw whatever the machine's limit is. When shown to a person, it appears as whatever sort of iden- tification is expected, including whatever the name the user is saying they are. Those who see it forget the name as per Arcane 5, but can still remember the us- er's face. One point of Quintessence is used to make it function for a scene. CHIRP Card

name: Cascade 23 Laser Pistol
description: A light and deadly energy weapon popular among field agents, it uses its Arete to fire a laser doing stand- ard Forces damage and costing on Quintessence per shot. Craftmason Pistol

name: Cauldron of Spies
description: A cauldron that when filled with water, brought to a boil, and with the correct words spoken (Arete difficul- ty 7) will create bats (at night) and rooks (during the day) through whose eyes the Mage can see. They can travel for several miles and exist for 12 hours, after which they disappear into the shadows. The Cauldron can store up to 10 points of Paradox before overloading, causing all of the Paradox to back- lash. DCMDs

name: Cephalic VCR
description: A useful Device created by the New World Order, usually part of the equipment in Room 101, the Ce- phalic VCR is disguised as a standard VCR (and func- tions as such, though more recent models use DVDs Nothing to See Here

name: Chains of Leviathan, The
description: Weapons 149 A heavy black chain belt, with two rings connecting to smaller chains. When worn, the chains can attack out of any shadow within the Mage’s line of sight. To hit, Arete (difficulty 7) is rolled. The ends of the chains are barbed iron hooks charged with Prime to deliver Aggravated damage. When the Paradox the Chains cause builds up to 10, it is split between all Awakened individuals within 10 feet for a backlash. Devil-Chaser Whip

name: Chango's Blade
description: A weapon created by the Bata'a to help them destroy their enemies, the Followers of Set, this machete is consecrated in fire and sacrificed to Chango. If Chango approves, it will flare white-hot in the presence of the Followers of Set, blinding them so that they can be destroyed. In fact, it will flame when drawn against any vampire whatsoever, and will do Aggravated dam- age. This costs on Quintessence per combat. When it runs out of Quintessence, Chango's blessing is gone and the blade becomes a regular machete again. Hrunting

name: Chatter Bomb
description: tools, and would have uses for enhanced computers, peripherals and, of course, Digital Web hardware. This chapter consists of three parts: Wonders that interact with the Digital Web, computer Hardware, and Smart Cards that can fake identification and oth- er things. Web This device gets hardwired into a laptop. When an agent operates it, posting using it to social media and spending two points of Quintessence, they can spread plausible explanations and pop-scientific rationale for the impossible things happening around them. This negates one point of Paradox in the current scene. Of course, if the witnesses see the same effect later with- out the Chatter Bomb operating, Paradox is doubled, and the Chatter Bomb itself is vulgar in areas not used to social media. Chirp Node

name: CHIRP Card
description: A gray plastic card with a magnetic stripe, Coalminer’s Handy Identity Randomizing Processor card, often called a Randomizer, it queries a system to find a list of people with access and then transforms into an ID card for one of those people. To do this, roots intertwine with the VBC-3, it puts up two vines, one of which goes into the user’s eye and the other up their nose. This creates a mental link through which the user can control the VBC-3. Aside from the dis- comfort from using it, the Mind-Link slowly transfers bits of the user’s memories and consciousness to the VBC-3, and the user is unable to recognize it as hap- pening. Cards the user must roll Wits + Security, Computer or Hack- ing, and then once that is successful an Arete roll. If both succeed, the user gains access to the system. On a botch, the card is eaten and alarms are triggered. The DDGR Card

name: Chirp Node
description: 22 Mystic Armory A small wireless device capable of scanning all sorts of social media networks, filtering down to a specific topic, and alter the messages being sent by certain tar- gets. Specifically, this allows the Agent to attack Back- ground traits tied to the social network, such as Influ- ence. This costs two Quintessence per dot of the tar- geted trait. The trait dots will return at a rate of one per day, as the target repairs the reputation damage. The Chopper

name: Chitin
description: This implant can reflexively spend a point of Quin- tessence to reduce one attack from Lethal damage to Bashing. If Rejected, the flesh is raw and brittle, and as long as Aggravated damage remains, the area that is damaged cannot soak at all. Deviant's Heart

name: Chopper, The
description: The Compact Hypergeometric Organization and Pu- rification Processer, or Chopper, looks like a large keyboard wrapped around a dark glass sphere. Con- taining multiple of the most powerful CPUs on the market, they provide the power and render the display on the globe. It needs to be taken into the Digital Web to work its magick, but it can't help with that, the user needs to do it themself (as in Virtual Talisman Trans- mogrification). Once in the Digital Web, at a cost of 3 Quintessence per turn and an Arete roll at difficulty 7, it can destroy sectors. Each success erases 10 meters of formatted space, and everyone in the area takes one level of Lethal damage per success. This damage fol- lows the connections out of the Web, and harms the physical body of those who are merely connected by Astral or Sensory means. This effect is, of course, quite vulgar. CMAP

name: Claws
description: Retractable claws that are extremely effective as hand-to-hand weapons. They attack with difficulty 6 and with Strength + Background Cost Lethal damage. Detox Implant

name: Clay Man Amulet
description: A clay amulet in the shape of a man, worn on a cord around the neck. It is attuned to the owner by blood or semen, and from there it absorbs the next five wounds they take while wearing it in their entirety. Each wound causes a limb to crumble, with the fifth and final one causing the head to do so. Healing Figurine

name: Clockers
description: When computers get hit by paradox, it usually takes the form of heat which fries the machine rendering it useless. For people who don't want to take the hint and slow down, there's Clockers. An extreme cooling system, they bleed off paradox and accelerate a Virtual Adept's system. When not in use, a clocker is best stored in liquid nitrogen, Freon or some other super- cooled liquid, and ideally fed tass to cancel out the paradox it has accrued. A clocker includes a Time 3 affect to increase the compute power of the rig. If the clocker becomes full of paradox, it will explode causing 10 dice of damage to the Mage and destroying the computer it is attached to. Digital Interface Armband

name: Clockwork Sycamore
description: a A helicopter powered by a spring, which takes over a half hour for a half dozen strong men to wind. It can then fly for six turns (at 35 meters per turn, roughly the speed of a horse at full gallop). Corporate Raider Jet

name: Cloning Devices
description: Though human cloning remains in the realm of sci- ence-fiction for Sleepers, the Technocracy has been active in the area for many years. Old model clones were mentally unstable and short-lived; however, the advent of animal clones has made human clones much more acceptable to the Consensus. 72 Mystic Armory The cloning process begins and ends with a Memory Dump, two Arete rolls to copy the target’s memories (they must be present!) into the attached computer’s hard drive and the second to place them inside the blank clone. Each piece of this takes as long as 24 hours due to the sheet size of human memory. The creation of the blank clone body takes about a week. This requires five successes on an Arete roll of difficulty 9 (reducible to 6 with adequate preparation and skills) and three rolls may be made during any one attempt. Flesh Canvas

name: Cloud Dance of Eternal Vision and Joy, The
description: A kata (scripted series of movements) studied by the Akashayana and the Wu Lung, the Cloud Dance is written on rice paper and consists of 101 postures. Each posture is accompanied by three haiku. Reading it can help the student achieve Arete 3 (with Intelli- gence 4 to understand it), but to learn Correspond- ence 3, they must also have Dexterity 4 and Do 2 to practice the movements. The Codex Licentia

name: Clout Perfume
description: A special perfume blend, mixing pheromones and fragrances to guarantee that the wearer is the center of attention. These ingredients can be customized to signal seduction, intimidation, compliance, etc., and one side effect is that those who encounter the wearer will rarely forget them. This, in total, adds four dice to the wearer's social rolls that go along with the goal of the scent. After setting the mood, it requires a Will- power roll (difficulty 7) to break free of it. Dharma Bomb/Apple of Discord

name: CMAP
description: The Consciousness Mapping and Projection Appa- ratus, CMAP for short, is an elaborate headset with a cybernetic jack to link directly into the brain is popular among Iterators who spend a lot of time in the Digital Web. It provides a method of Astral Immersion into the Digital Web for those who want it, and can be used for Sensory Immersion for those who don’t want to take on the risks of Astral Immersion. The quintes- sence acts as Health Levels in the Digital Web, and once all 15 points are burned away, the Iterator is vul- nerable to harm. Digital Drill

name: Coco Macaque
description: A sorcerer's stick, usually dedicated to Baron Samedi or sometimes a crutch devoted to Legba. It is usually a black walking-stick, though, and it can serve many purposes for its owner. It can spy ahead for danger (Correspondence 1), it can hop by itself to move around (Forces 3), discern the future (Time 2), and even kill those who are dangers to its master (Life 4). Some can instead use Mind 2 or 3 to send bad dreams or Entropy 1 to detect lies. Supposedly, these canes are unbreakable, but can be destroyed by fire. The Deadly Warbots of Doctor van Allmen

name: Codex Licentia, The
description: In English, the Book of License, it is an extended Latin parable describing the Path of Screams and how to traverse it and become an Infernalist... Books and Learning 11 It can act as a level 3 Library, and can teach the Cosmology, Enigmas, Lore (spirits), Metaphysics and Occult Knowledges. Codex Mendoza

name: Codex Mendoza
description: This book details the history of the Aztecs from the Aztec point of view. It is written in a system descended from Mixtec pictograms and includes information on religious and magickal practices, including rotes and rituals. Few copies of this book survived the Spanish destruction of the Aztec empire, but there are a few in circulation. The Dithyramb of the Maenad Melanippe

name: Coding Tunes, Vol I
description: A CD that imparts Quintessence when played. When played, the Quintessence that is released is par- ticularly useful for tasks requiring focus and order, such as coding. Dr. Reuter's Jewel of Inspiration

name: Communications Jammer
description: A small black box that is the worst nightmare of many in the modern, connected society. It can shut down all radio and cellular communication in the immediate area. By spending three Quintessence points, it can fry GPS, hard drives and nav systems or generally anything that uses electricity. For an addi- tional point, it can even force Wonders to be restarted. E/E, Personal Cloaking Device

name: Consensual Hallucination Generator
description: These devices overwrite the memories of witnesses to supernatural events. The smallest ones are pen size and can affect one person at a time, the standard size is a flashlight which can affect up to six people, and the largest is the size of a car battery, and can affect up to 200 people. It overwrites memories of supernatural events with plausibly similar mundane events. Botches can do serious psychological damage, however. Hidioshi Wearable Translator

name: Cord of the Three Winds
description: 78 Mystic Armory Wand of Health

name: Corporate Raider Jet
description: The most expensive and luxurious corporate planes don’t even begin to compare to the Corporate Raider Jet, reserved for upper-level Syndicate Managers. Be- yond that, it is armored heavily, has hidden compo- nents hiding 30mm chain guns and air-to-air missiles, and all essential systems have redundant backups to make it almost impossible to force the plane to crash. Hermes's Carriage

name: Cosmic Communications Package
description: information, Personal Transport is full of items that can move one person around and contains an eclectic selection of them, Space Travel details ships capable of traveling Deep Space/the Deep Umbra. The last two sections are Teleportation and Vehicles, containing Wonders that transport people instantly and those that can be used to travel around the Earth, often with armor and other benefits for those inside. Developed in the early 90s, this device is mostly in- teresting for historical reasons now. This card, and the software on it, when inserted into a computer (it can fit both desktops and laptops) allow the computer to communicate via radio signal, cellular signal, and other communication media, even a garage door opener. For 8 points, it can even send and receive satellite trans- missions. The DoCo

name: Craftmason Pistol
description: 142 Mystic Armory The Craftmasons are already considered terrifying by other factions when they're armed, but nothing is scar- ier than a Craftmason with one of these. It has multi- ple barrels, all of which fire at once. Roll Arete diffi- culty 6. Each success increase the weapon's rate of fire by 1 shot per round for the scene. All shots must be fired at the same target. Dimension Phase Disruption Emitter (DPDE)

name: Creation Engine
description: A meter-long metal cylinder that can be worn across the back with a strap, the Creation Engine is a nano and femto-tech factory capable of generating almost any form of non-exotic or radioactive material, so long as it fits into the output chamber, which is 30 cm long and 15 in diameter. Each creation requires on point of Quintessence and requires that the user input the specifications of the object or material to create in detail through a networked computer system: the more they know about how to design the object or the struc- ture of the material, the more likely they are to get functional version of whatever they are looking for. Infinite Change Purse

name: Daedalean Passages
description: Both swords inflict Aggravated damage and have +1 damage over other swords of their type. They each also provide 5 dice of countermagick for magick with con- trary resonance to their own. For instance, Yin coun- ters fire, and Yang counters cold. The owner may use the sword as a 2nd rank Node: yin grants quintessence with Icy and Metallic resonance, while Yang grants Fiery and Energetic. Thought normally the compulsion to seek the other sword can be resisted as a Mind 3 effect, paradox back- lashes that have resonance that matches the sword goes into a Quiet pool that compels the user to immediate seek out the sword’s mate. When together, they have no magick whatsoever, as they are in balance. When they do not exist, they are usually reforged during a Quiet or a Seeking, and rarely spend long without existing. Vengeance Blade

name: DCMDs
description: Disguised as trash, Disposable Camouflaged Moni- toring Devices (sometimes called TrashCams) are actu- ally sophisticated surveillance devices. They roll Arete to determine if they activate, and if successful they record data (usually just audio and video, but some- times from more sophisticated sensors) and are collect- ed, fed into a specialized device, and then the data can be transferred to a computer. The Fiberopticon

name: DDGR Card, The
description: Created by an anonymous Virtual Adept, the DDGR (Dirt-DiGgeR) looks like a normal debit card. However, when inserted into an ATM, it fakes creden- tials from the bank’s Board and pulls up information on sketchy activities that the bank and its customers have been involved in the last week, then prints them to the receipt. This is accomplished by a Da- ta/Forces/Mind effect and uses the card’s Arete vs. difficulty of 7. Each success uncovers one nasty deed and the guilty parties. This is a coincidental effect un- less a Sleeper who doesn’t know what the DDGR is for sees the receipt. Then, it causes three Paradox and often a call to the police. The card works only once. Identification

name: Deadly Warbots of Doctor van Allmen, The
source_book: Tradition Book: Sons of Ether (1st Edition)
description: These robots of death were created by an Etherite aligned with the Nazis, who fortunately was defeated before they could ever leave the Chantry they were constructed in. These robots can fly, fire beam wea- ponry, and sustain massive amounts of damage before being destroyed (five soak dice and seven health levels). However, they are unintelligent, and must be directed. Furthermore, they are extremely vulgar and run through their Quintessence store very quickly, as each power usage costs one point of quintessence. Digital Dollz

name: Deep Space Combat Armor
description: A suit made of a grey metal/plastic hybrid material, it contains computers, life-support, and feedback sys- tems. It acts as four levels of armor but subtracts three dice from Dexterity based rolls. The wearer can survive in space for several hours, the sensors give Forces and Correspondence perceptions, and the wearer gets an effective 2 extra points of Strength. Every time the armor is penetrated, its Arete is rolled and if it fails, it loses Strength bonuses (due to the actuators no longer working) and the containment has been breached (a serious problem in Deep Space). Doc Eon's Action Jackets

name: Detox Implant
description: A complex series of membranes and pumps installed into the user’s body continually filter their blood to remove impurities in a way that the body cannot natu- rally match. The user is thus immune to drugs and poisons that are ingested, injected or inhaled, though things that cause surface injury and irritation (tear gas or pepper spray) affect them normally. Though this implant always works, whenever it is used a single die is rolled. On a one, although it works this time, the filters become clogged and need to be cleaned before it will work again. When this happens, the user (only) hears a beeping to signal that the im- plant is not currently working. Cleaning the filters requires eating special food and being hooked up to a purifier (via a port in the user’s left hipbone). Digital Enhancement Implants Technocracy: Iteration X page 51 (DEI) Guide to the Technocracy page 216 (DEI and ADEI) Convention Book: Iteration X page 74 (ADEI) Iteration X is well-known for their implants. The most famous of which are the Digital Enhancement Implant and the Advanced Digital Enhancement Im- plant, DEI and ADEI for short. They are installed directly into the brain of the user: the DEI requires that several brain regions be removed to make room, namely emotional control, expression, long-term plan- ning and complex moral judgments need to be out- sourced to the device, while the ADEI is more of a nanotech mesh on the inside of the skull, not remov- ing any actual brain mass. Thus, while the DEI is visi- Internal 61 ble to most mundane scans that cover the head (such as MRI and X-ray), the ADEI is invisible to anything short of opening the skull itself. Either of them comes with a jack behind the left ear that can reshape itself so that it will fit almost any sort of plug, allowing the Iterator to interface directly with most modern technology, including everything built by Iteration X. The DEI and ADEI have several common compo- nents, including: • Eidetic Memory - the ADEI can store roughly 400 TB of data, equivalent to about two years of con- tinuous 4K video, while the DEI can only store about half as much • Time Sense and Lightning Calculator merits • Memory can be downloaded into an Iteration X compatible computer • Can alter memories with Forces 2/Mind 2 (often used right before a download) • 4 dots of Dream/Hypercram • Halves the time for all hacking attempts • Can jack directly into a computer to have Sensory access to the Digital Web • In appropriate vehicles, can act as a Digital Inter- face Armband Aside from the form factor, the most significant dif- ference is that the ADEI is shielded from electromag- netic fields, so that an EMP will not disable it, while it can for the DEI. Some speculate that the DEI acts, to a small extent, as a collective unconscious for those members of Itera- tion X who have one. If this is the case, or if it has risen to a collective consciousness, they aren’t saying anything, and the younger Iterators equipped with ADEIs are not reporting similar behavior. Electropulse Hand

name: Deviant's Heart
description: Still somewhat experimental, this mod transplants the heart of a Werewolf into the Scientist. Quintes- sence may be spent on: • Additional actions that harm someone • Successes on Strength rolls • Heal two bashing or one Lethal damage The number of Quintessence that may be spent this way per turn is limited by the smaller of Geni- us/Avatar or Dexterity. Whenever they do this, how- ever, they must roll Willpower (difficulty 8) to avoid a rage causing them to try to murder everything in sight. If they fall into this rage, all Physical attributes increase by one and a Willpower point may be spent to gain a turn of lucidity. This continues until the Heart runs out of Quintessence or the Scientist is rendered un- conscious. Rejection for the Heart is particularly bad, as a heart is a vital organ. Until the Rejection is re- paired, the Scientist takes one Aggravated damage per turn. Distance Vision

name: Devil-Chaser Whip
description: This whip is a traditional implement for damaging Spirits and Ghosts, using a Forces and Spirit effect. It functions as a normal whip doing Strength + 2 Lethal damage, but it effects ghosts, demons and spirits of all sorts, and does an additional die of damage against them. Diana's Arrows

name: Dharma Bomb/Apple of Discord
description: Originally created as the Apple of Discord, the more modern incarnation of this Charm is the Dharma Bomb. It is a firecracker that explodes into a garish, hypnotic display of colors, and it exaggerates and ag- gravates an emotional weakness of the target, causing them to act out in an embarrassing fashion. Fractal Symphonies

name: Diana's Arrows
description: Perfectly balanced arrows, bolts or throwing knives. These give a -1 difficulty to all attacks with a successful Arete roll (difficulty 5). They can be found and re- trieved for reuse later, though each time some cannot be recovered, and maximum Quintessence decreases by one. When it reaches zero, they have run out. Dirty Bomb

name: Digital Dollz
description: A pseudo-intelligent but fragile companion. Dollz are customizable with respect to personality profile, gender and ethnicity, and its only interests are its own- er and what it is told to be interested in. Dollz have no magickal or combat ability and are deactivated if they take a single point of damage. They only exist in the Digital Web, but there they look and feel for all pur- poses like humans, albeit limited ones. The doll stays active until the owner logs out or it takes damage, and it requires an Arete roll and a point of Quintessence to activate a deactivated Doll. The Emperor's Songbird

name: Digital Drill
description: Appearing in the Digital World as a halogen flash- light, this wonder tears Restrictions apart and reas- sembles them so that the Mage can pass into Restricted sectors. To do so without alerting the owner of the Restriction, a Perception + Technology roll (difficulty 7) is needed. Digital Online Package

name: Digital Interface Armband
description: One of the most important tools in the arsenal of an Iterator, the DIA creates a mind/machine interface between the wearer and any piece of technology that it is hooked into, either through wires, a short-range infrared signal or a longer-range radio signal. Jury- rigging such a connection requires an Intelligence + Technology roll at difficulty 7, though using an object designed for it (such as Iteration X equipment) is only difficulty 6. It can only send commands, not receive Computers 25 data back, so the user needs some sort of interface to ensure that they’re making good decisions. HEAT Chip

name: Digital Online Package
description: A common device given to most Virtual Adepts by their mentors before the Reckoning, the Digital Online Package contains a guide to the Digital Web, a map of the major paths on it, a card that can be insert- ed into a desktop computer to allow a VR helmet or bodysuit to be attached for sensory immersion. Electroephemeral Scanner

name: Dimension Phase Disruption Emitter (DPDE)
description: The essential firearm for Void Engineers that deal with intruders from other dimensions. It's sleeker than a normal firearm and has a dial with three settings: stun (green), kill (yellow) and disintegrate (red). When the user rolls Enlightenment, the DPDE is able to breach the local Gauntlet to target things on the other side (or else bring them across so that it can target them in conventional space) and can do this with mul- tiple targets. It requires a Dexterity + Energy Weapons roll and does bashing, lethal or Aggravated damage depending on the setting. It both rolls succeed, it does the usual damage from Enlightened Science plus addi- tional damage from the Dexterity + Energy Weapons roll from excess successes. Doc Eon's Gas Bullets

name: Dirty Bomb
description: The ultimate fallback weapon, and one that the Un- ion STRONGLY asserts does not exist. But of course it does. A canister wired into the Agent’s back so that it is triggered by their death, the Dirty Bomb is connect- ed to a small pocket dimension where dozens and doz- 150 Mystic Armory ens of vulgar Procedures await. When the Bomb goes off, this realm collapses, the contents spill out, and the resulting Paradox devastates the area around the now- deceased operative. Not only does this shatter their Eidolon through sheer volume of Paradox, but every- thing within 10 meters suffers a maximal backlash, within 20 meters it is halved. Anything killed in this backlash fully ceases to exist. The Divine Staff of Fortuitous Intervention

name: Disguise Hat
description: Wearables 159 A hat that can change forms. When the wearer touches the hat, it rolls Arete with difficulty 6 to change to a different one of its 10 forms. With a suc- cess, the hat causes everyone looking at the wearer to interpret everything about them as matching the hat. These ten forms are fixed at creation, but can be changed with a Matter 3/Mind 3 effect (difficulty 6) with at least two successes and a successful Dexterity + Crafts roll at difficulty 6. Dr. Wingbat's Ether jet Rocketpack

name: Distance Vision
description: This biomod gives the Scientist zoom vision and even the ability to see through solid objects. With no obstructions, their visual range increases to a full mile with everything looking as though it is right in front of them. By spending a point of quintessence, they can see through solid objects for one turn. Enhanced Pheromones

name: Dithyramb of the Maenad Melanippe, The
description: A book that is mostly of value to Ecstatics, Verbena and Dreamspeakers, though also to some Marauders, the Dithyramb makes near incomprehensible leaps of logic and deep study has been known to temporarily drive the readers mad, just as the Maenads of Greek myth. The benefits, however, are the ability to learn Arete 3 and Life 4. The Greater Key of Solomon

name: Divine Staff of Fortuitous Intervention, The
description: A four-foot-long staff carved from fine-grained white wood. In combat, though, it allows a reflexive Arete roll (difficulty 5) and successes are added to dodges against attacks, as the staff moves in its wielder’s hands to intercept them. EMP Grenade

name: Divining Staff
description: A long rod with two curving, overlapping spires, a priest can use the Divining Staff to locate the person in the community responsible for whatever evil has be- fallen it, even if they do not realize it or consider their actions evil. Dogon Divination Bowl

name: Doc Eon's Action Jackets
description: These World War II-era aviator jackets are popular among Etherites, especially since Doc Eon’s disappear- ance. They provide four dice of armor with no Dexteri- ty penalty and are extremely well insulated, allowing the wearer to stay warm in cold temperatures, but also cool in hot weather. Exoskeleton

name: Doc Eon's Gas Bullets
description: Fireable from a normal handgun, Doc Eon’s Gas Bullets can render a person unconscious and leave no traces. On a hit, these bullets do Forces damage, albeit Bashing damage that cannot kill the target, only render them unconscious. Doc Eon's Lemurian Lightning Gun

name: Doc Eon's Lemurian Lightning Gun
description: Shaped more-or-less like a dueling pistol but carved with glyphs from the lost civilization of Lemuria, this weapon is extremely powerful and valuable. It is im- mune to Paradox (and no one has figured out how to replicate THIS) and it does Forces damage on a suc- cessful attack (Dexterity + Energy Weapons followed by Arete). The user can activate the “mercy dial” to halve the damage. Ectoplasmic Disruption Rounds

name: Doc Eon's Time Watch
description: Miscellaneous 97 A pocket watch created by the great Doc Eon himself in his experiments with Time Travel. When opened, it reveals transistors and vacuum tubes rather than watch face. When used, everything in a 10 yard radius is shunted backwards in time, but only a small amount. With a successful Arete roll, the characters are sent back one turn and can change their actions. The user gains at LEAST one point of Paradox due to the sheet vulgarity of this sort of time travel. Dr. Worvil's Wand

name: DoCo, The
description: A high-tech watch grafted to the skin of an agent, the DoCo acts as a communicator, a monitor for vital signs and, most importantly, a Quintessence reservoir. Once the agent falls to the Wounded health level, it automatically feeds one Quintessence per turn into the owner, without the need for them to use Prime to draw it. It sends out an emergency alert for an owner who becomes incapacitated, and all available agents are required to respond to these calls immediately. EDG Virtuous Executive Smartphone

name: Dogon Divination Bowl
description: A bowl adorned with carvings of animals and used as a storage location for divination tools. When cared for properly and blessed, it gives a -1 difficulty to divina- tion using the tools stored within it. GODSPIN Blotter Acid

name: Dormancy Tiki
description: Carved from basalt (or other igneous rock), the Dormancy Tiki has is oblong with a conical head. It serves one essential purpose: it contains spirits that soothe the spirits of local volcanoes to prevent erup- tions. Fertility Tiki

name: Dr. Day's Hypodermic
description: Created by a Fallen Etherite, the Hypodermic draws more than just blood. The blood donor will suffer various illnesses as a piece of their “life essence” is drawn own for the Doctor’s use. This includes leaving the patient with a bit of amnesia, as Dr. Day takes some of their memories. Taken orally or intravenously, Super-Steroids will in- crease one Physical trait by 2 dots, two traits by one dot each, or give two extra health levels. This boost lasts for about an hour, after which the user tends to have withdrawal. Science Arete is rolled during a blood draw. Success causes a bit of the victim’s essence to be drawn with the blood, and it is transferred once the blood is consumed. The victim feels listless and confused for weeks and is ex- tremely unlikely to Awaken after this. The consumer gains not only regular memories, but also muscle memory, giving them access to the victim’s Abilities. The Hypodermic has never been used on a Mage, but it would almost certainly have catastrophic effects if it were, attempting to steal a piece of a Mage’s soul. Helix Ring Technocracy: Progenitors pages 48 A Genegineer made silver ring with a DNA double- helix containing micro-syringes etched into it. It has three effects. It can store a genetic pattern by drawing a tiny sample (imperceptibly), it can inject an agent (again imperceptibly) that causes a minor negative mutation in the target which makes them ill, and final- ly it can restore one Health level of the wearer by re- pairing damage to their genome. Jangler Pod

name: Dr. Reuter's Jewel of Inspiration
description: Other Beings 111 A bright red ruby worn on a leather thong around the neck, the Jewel of Inspiration contains Creative Quintessence, best used for acts of creation, both lit- eral and figurative. The Filth Altar

name: Dr. Wingbat's Ether jet Rocketpack
description: This rocketpack allows the wearer to fly, though it is a particularly dangerous way to achieve this effect. 160 Mystic Armory Arete activates it (takeoff) and it works for five minutes per point of Quintessence. Once in the air, Dexterity + Jetpack (or Technology) is used to control it as though stunt-driving, with both takeoff and landing at difficul- ty 7. Faerie Cap

name: Dr. Worvil's Wand
description: A dark mahogany magician’s wand from the early 20th century. It’s actually segmented, so that it can be folded to fit in a pocket and extend with the flick of wrist. It contains tiny compartments holding various small objects that can be pulled from the wand during a performance. It also uses esoteric Science to produce rabbits from hats, to make women disappear, or to transfer a pocket watch from someone’s coat to the user’s. A Wits + Occult roll (difficulty 7) is needed to use the wand successfully, otherwise it will do some- thing else at random when used. Mobile Home

name: Dream Gate
description: These Talismans can appear as any mundane object. The user can then enter the High Umbra astrally (as per Mind 5), while engaged in REM sleep. They can stay in the High Umbra until they awaken, naturally or otherwise. If killed in the dreamform, the Mage loses half of their current Willpower and wakes up, but course, they have refined many of these techniques, some benign and some very much no, into Wonders. This chapter is divided into sections on Dreams and Sleep, Emotions, Perceptions and the manipulation of Thoughts and Memory. Sleep otherwise suffers no ill-effects other than being unable to use a Dream Gate for a lunar month. Dream Spirit Bag

name: Dream Spirit Bag
description: This bag is made of leather and ornamented with beads. It contains sleep distilled sleep in a powder form. By pulling out a handful and blowing it at a target, the Mage can roll their Arete with difficulty the target’s temporary Willpower rating. A single success causes drowsiness (+2 difficulty to all rolls) but two or more successes causes the target to fall asleep deeply, for one hour per success (maximum of 12). Lethe's Spheres

name: Ear of Dionysus
description: The head of a fallen friend or a defeated foe can be a potent magickal object, and in ancient Britain and Gaul, they were used for divination. They can be asked yes or no questions about the past or future, and a “yes” is delivered by the box it is in becoming lighter, a “no” by it becoming heavier. A warning: the head, if a their personality does not match well with the ques- tioner, have been known to lie. Sacred Bullhide

name: Ebon Candles of Manifest Nigrescence
description: When lit, these candles dim all conventional light sources (snuffing out candles, matches and cigarettes, among other small flames) to one quarter strength and put out a gray light that enhances shadows, making them feel tangible and hungry. Anyone with a Strength of 1, such as small children and animals, suffocate in this darkness unless a light source is activated or they leave the area, a difficult task with movement rates halved. Perception rolls are at +3 difficulty in the shadows due to muted sounds and blurred vision. This area is the entire floor of a building that the candle is lit on, and the candle lasts for a total of eight hours, but this can be used in sessions rather than all at once. Professor Parallax's Displacement Device

name: Ectoplasmic Disruption Rounds
description: Special bullets that the Technocracy has carefully de- signed to be effective against ghosts. They come in all the standard gauges used by Union firearms. They lock onto the signature of the target and then explode. This not only can damage ghosts, but also seem to be quite effective against Vampires and Werewolves (half-dead and half-spirit), causing Aggravated damage. These rounds are extremely expensive, and are not issued to agents lightly Ectoplasmic Disruptor Cannon (EDC)

name: Ectoplasmic Disruptor Cannon (EDC)
description: Also called the "ghostduster," this sidearm is attached to a backpack which acts as a power source. It fires a Prime beam at any materialized Umbrood or ghost, and can even do so through the Gauntlet with the right adjustments. Each shot uses five Quintessence and requires a Dexterity + Firearms (difficulty 7) roll to hit its target. Once it hits, it uses a Prime 4/Entropy 4/Spirit 4 effect to do Aggravated damage against its targets if they are materialized and costing Power or Corpus (as applicable) to non-materialized ones. This can even be fired safely at possessed humans to forcibly evict the occupying entity. Endless Ammo Clips

name: EDG Virtuous Executive Smartphone
description: Though not a high-powered smartphone, the Virtu- ous is the absolute peak of smartphone technology in exactly one way: wealth signaling. Costing just shy of $100,000, only special influences can buy one, it is always “out of stock” for others. Though it has last generation technology, it provides 24 hour a day con- cierge service, making reservations, theater seats, hotel rooms and other bookings trivial, and without hyper- tech. A Syndicate agent can monitor any Virtuous Smartphone with Data 2 and can subliminally influ- ence the owner’s emotions with Mind 2. Thus, alt- hough wealthy Citizens see these as status symbols, Syndicate agents are assigned them as a minor pun- ishment, allowing their superiors to micromanage 118 Mystic Armory them more easily. Enlightened Smartphone

name: Electroephemeral Scanner
description: This scanner allows a computer to scan an object in- to the Digital Web. It creates a virtual representation of the object online. Jump Box

name: Electropulse Hand
description: This implant goes into the hand and stores static electricity from everyday life. The user can discharge this on a command, executing a Forces 2/Prime 2 attack. 62 Mystic Armory Exo-Musculature and Exo-Skeletons

name: ELMART
description: An art deco style chrome box the size of a refrigera- tor, the ELectrorganic MAtter Recombinant Trans- locator (ELMART) converts anyone who steps inside into sentient electricity, allowing them to travel through the power grid (or even via satellite), though rematerialization requires another ELMART on the other end. While sentient electricity, however, the user can spy on anyone through electric/electronic devices and even enter the Digital Web. Flying Unguent

name: EMP Grenade
description: These powerful charms are quite simple: the user configures a blast radius and a timer, and when it goes off, though no damage is done to people, the grenade fries all non-shielded electronics in that radius. Need- less to say, the Technocracy are not fans of it, and the Etherites produce them as often as they can. Fan of Kang Wu

name: Emperor's Songbird, The
description: A mechanical songbird that sings a single song flaw- lessly, is made from gold and triggered by pressing a ruby on its forehead. It costs seven points of Quintes- sence whenever it is triggered. Imperial Tiger

name: Encephalographic Probe
