name: UNIVID
description: A clear plastic card with a dot matrix for configura- tion on the back, along with magnetic strips, Universal ID cards can be processed to convert them into virtual- ly any form of identification. Though it is easier with a model, a Wits + Technology roll (difficulty 8) allows it to be done without. In either case, an Arete roll (diffi- culty 7) is necessary to finalize the transformation. Universal Identification Card Kit

name: Unstoppable Binoculars
description: Binoculars that can see through walls, one of the best surveillance devices the Men in Black have devel- oped. Vehicular Manar

name: USAC
description: Once considered significantly more exotic, in the modern world a keyboard the size of a smartphone with a wireless connection is nothing out of the ordi- nary. However, the Universal Systems Access Comput- er is not quite standard, as it can access any computer system, hard drive, network or server within 100 feet. This functions are a cost of one Quintessence a day, allowing it to run for twenty days between charges. VBC-3 Bio-Computer and Mind-Link XF251

name: Usurer’s Purse
description: a Created by the Solificati during their brief time asso- ciating with the Order of Reason, they were coin purs- es that would transmute base metals into gold. In the modern world, they are more likely to be wallets that will convert scraps of paper into $100 bills. Although these are forgeries of the highest quality, they also in- clude an effect which causes people to not look too closely at them. A single success on activation is enough to transform all of the base material inside into valuable currency. Instruments

name: Vap'rous Candles of Lethe
description: These candles are made of a special wax that emits sleep-inducing vapors. They need two successes on a Perception roll (difficulty 8) to smell the vapors. They will fall asleep Stamina + 1 turns after exposure. Those who are near sleep are unable to respond to the fact that others have preceded them. a These cigarettes are produced by the Technocracy and commonly carried by New World Order and Syn- dicate Agents. Each contains a Mind 2 effect to make the Agent seem more trustworthy to the person the cigarette is given to. By sharing it, the target trusts the gifter enough to answer politely phrased questions. This is a coincidental effect with Enlightenment rolled against the target’s Willpower. This, of course, only works on smokers. Brittany's Music Box

name: Vehicular Manar
description: Appearing as a radar scope, its capable of detecting magick in an area of approximately a city block with an Arete roll at difficulty 6. X-Ray Glasses

name: Vehicular Satellite Uplink
description: A special onboard computer and software for a vehi- cle, this gives it access to the Union’s most accurate maps, to tracking devices, to real-time traffic data, etc., allowing for much faster travel and easier tracking of targets. Vrum Vrum Boom

name: Vending Machines (Chi Restoration)
description: Usable with a DoCo, a Chi Vending Machine can recharge its Quintessence store. However, though vending machines are quite common in East Asia, these are still rare. Each one holds enough Quintes- sence to fully recharge a single DoCo, but needs to be recharged manually or by a nearby Node once drained. Primal Energy 115 116 Mystic Armory Transit and Communication Mages have the uncanny ability to get to places that no one else can and to communicate across distances that seem impossible. They have developed numerous Devices and Talismans for both Transit and Commu- nication that can not only get them places that they otherwise couldn’t go but can also go to those places in style. This chapter is divided into five sections. Commu- nicators which covers Wonders than can transmit Communicators Throughout history, fast communication has been essential. Though it is often taken for granted in mod- ern times, where communication devices must do oth- er things to be worth worrying about, effective com- munication has historically been a deciding factor in many conflicts. Cosmic Communications Package

name: Vengeance Blade
description: Traditionally made of black obsidian with the tar- get’s name carved into it, in the modern world the designs are a lot more varied. A vengeance spirit (who has been persuaded that this act of vengeance is right- eous) is bound into the blade, and this gives the blade - 2 difficulty to hit the target and adds 2 to the damage pool. Once the vengeance is fulfilled, the blade breaks and the spirit moves on. A set of passages and hallways in a building built to protect the inner rooms. When active, they defy space and logic, though someone who knows the secrets of the place can travel easily, giving them an advantage over intruders. Each such use, though, costs a Quintes- sence and is vulgar. It is much simpler to use a Mind effect to navigate. Guardian Tiki

name: Viasilicos
description: These perfectly cut quartz crystals are used by the Order of Reason for long-distance communication. When in use, an image appears inside the crystal, and through these images communication is possible. The Viasilicos is created to match its surroundings, and is of no use if moved. Further, these are only useful un- der the light of the sun, and cannot be used after Personal Transport Some Wonders give an individual a sort of mobility that they wouldn’t normally have. These personal nightfall. Furthermore, there are several, disconnected collections of Viasilicos, they can only connect over specialized pathways, so particularly important Daeda- leans own several of them. To use one, the Daedalean meditates for an hour on its designs while tracing them and then project their thoughts to the distant key in the network. The thoughts will appear there at that moment, if the message is missed then there is no rec- ord. WatchCom

name: Vision Jewel
description: A Vision Jewel is a small, spherical gem, usually an emerald or aquamarine, that can travel around inde- pendently and transmit its surroundings to the Mage who owns it. It can move at 40 mph on its own and can travel anywhere it can reach. The owner can not only perceive the area where the Vision Jewel is as though there, but can also perform magick as though they were there through that correspondence connec- tion. Unfortunately for the owner, these Jewels are easy to see (Perception + Alertness difficulty 8 when it's trying to be stealthy) and connections go both ways: someone who touches the jewel can use it to target the Mage. The link with the Jewel can be broken instantly, causing it to fall to the ground, but it must be retrieved before the Mage can use it again. Wonders have been devised to make their owners harder to find, listen in on, or keep records on. Bafflejack Information 45

name: Visual Data & Analysis Spectrum (VDAS)
description: The VDAS gives an Agent access to the Union’s da- tabases wherever they go. Often implanted, it gives a crawl of green text in the corner of the Agent’s vision. Similar in effect to the Right-Click rote (Mage: The Ascension 20th Anniversary Edition page 602), the use of a VDAS requires special training, including Mind 1 for the Agent. Most VDAS units also include tracking so that the Union can find the agent using it, though this can be disabled by extremely knowledgeable users. Z488-C Video Data Retrieval System

name: Voice Disguiser
description: A tube decorated with colored seeds, it causes the voice of someone who speaks into it to boom with authority. In particular, this authority can be used to soothe the dead, giving it an Arete roll against difficul- ty 5 to put a Wraith into slumber. vision, the Astral Tiki, the Gauntlet rating is decreased by two. Barrier Field Generator (BFG)

name: Void Engineer Light Environment Suit
description: Extremely thin and flexible, these suits of ionic cloth are essential to Void Engineer operations. It gives two soak dice against bashing and Lethal damage, four against heat, cold, electricity or radiation, and allows survival in the -20 to 55-degree Centigrade range. Tar- geting hands or head (which are uncovered by default) negates this but adds 3 to the difficulty of the strike. The suit has a transparent hood that can be pulled out and worn as a helmet, and then the suit protects against vacuum, hostile atmosphere, water to 100 me- ters’ depth, and even greater extremes of heat and cold. The life support system uses on point of Quintes- sence per two hours of use, but the armor still operates even if it is out of Quintessence. Falconi and Associates Elite Business Attire Convention Book: Syndicate page 78 (as Elite Business At- tire)

name: Vrum Vrum Boom
description: A classic convertible created to take children on fan- tastic adventures…and which has a rather odd thresh- old of “safe” and “healthy.” The car will sprout wings and fly off to an adventure, including possibly into the Umbra and Etherspace. It always returns, though its passengers are not always as lucky. It can handle transport through all sorts of environments: when the convertible is closed, it becomes airtight. The car has the following powers: • Umbral Passage - the car can, when it chooses (not the driver) enter the Umbra and even cross the Horizon. • Armor - the metal parts of the car (i.e., everything but the retractable leather roof) are virtually imper- vious to harm. Nothing short of a tank can damage it, and the passengers are safe so long as they hide behind the metal and glass of the car. • Taffy Guns - These guns shoot a stream of thick taffy at the target. It has a dice pool of six and can fire in any direction in the plane of the car. Anyone trying to escape needs to roll Strength (difficulty 8) to get free. • Flight - It can fly, usually at 50 mph, sometimes at 100 mph, but maxing out at 200 mph. • Timing - The car has a sense of timing like a fiction writer. It will work or fail in large part based on what will be the most dramatic. The War Machine

name: Wand of Health
description: A wood, bone or metal wand with a pair of carved serpents wrapping around it. It can speed the recovery from any injury. Used by both Verbena and Hermet- ics, they have rather different attitudes towards these wands: Hermetics view them as tools and nothing more, Verbena consider them sacred trusts to be used to benefit others. If a patient is touched by it, the wand rolls Arete at difficulty 5. Each success heals a bashing or lethal Health Level at a speed two levels higher. Further, one success can cure a disease in four days and further successes each halve this time. The diffi- culty on curing a disease is the Toxin Rating. To heal damage (including Aggravated) instantly, the wand rolls Arete (difficulty 6), but the user suffers a level of bashing for each level of bashing or lethal healed, and one of lethal for every level of aggravated. This can be reversed to heal the user by causing damage to some- one else. Wound-Bearing Torc

name: War Machine, The
description: Three stories tall and shaped like a tripod with three joints on each leg and two clawed arms, the War Ma- chine is truly a terrifying thing to behold. Developed as a weapon during the Great War, it’s crew turned it against Allies and Central Powers alike. Although bul- let proof, artillery is able to damage it and it is current- ly broken junk, a reminder that the Sleepers can de- stroy the most sophisticated machines of Science. It moved safely at a speed of 20 mph, max speed of 30 mph, maneuverability 5, crew of 6, armor 10, a Strength of 10, along with a .30 caliber machine gun, two tentacles that do Strength + 2 damage and two claws that do Strength + 5 damage. Transit and Communication 131 132 Mystic Armory Weapons In both mythology and literature, few things are more evocative than magick weapons. Though swords are the best known, other weapons have been taken far beyond the capabilities of Sleeper craftsmen. Tech- nomages tend to create a lot of enhanced firearms, and Blades Arthur’s Excalibur, El Cid’s Colada, Charlemagne’s Joyeuse, Masamune (one of The Twins), Hrunting, Durandal, Shamshir-e-Zomorrodnegar (claimed to have been used by Solomon himself). There are countless magick swords through history, mythology and fiction. They are among the most well-known of Wonders, and many traditional (or romantically inclined) Mages try their hands at making them. Abh-t Dagger

name: War Tiki
description: Looking almost like a tree trunk with a snarling hu- man face, the War Tiki houses spirits of rage and bat- tle, giving the owner -1 on all difficulties to hit and an extra die for all soak rolls or attempts to dodge attacks. 156 Mystic Armory Weapons 157 Wearables Magick rings, armor, and clothing are all standard Wonders that have many legends about them. They all exist and are still quite popular. But they also have modernizations: high tech armor, hard suits, and other things. Accessories Some worn Wonders are neither clothing nor ar- mor. They may be hats or shoes, jetpacks or jewelry. Whatever they are, they must be worn to be of any use, and when possible are usually designed at least a bit with fashion in mind. Annulus Vigil: The Watchful Guardian Ring

name: Ward Tiki
description: Generally grim looking oblong heads made of igne- ous rock (gray granite being the most popular), Ward Tikis will subtly protect the area they defend: lava flows branch, hostile people get lost or have accidents, etc. How subtle these effects are decreases with how close to the warded area a danger gets. The lesser version is a tripod mounted weapon, the larger requires mounting on a vehicle to use. This weapon converts Quintessence directly into a laser capable of burning most beings out of existence. It costs one Quintessence to use the tripod mounted version but three points for the larger one. A Dexterity + Firearms (or Technology for the larger one) roll at difficulty 7 (or 9) for human-sized targets is necessary before the Forces damage from Arete can be rolled. Weapons 141 Barrel Improvements

name: Warware
description: A virtual weapon for use on the Digital Web. Much better regulated than physical weapons, usually if a person tries to take one out of the sector it spawned in, it de-rezzes, and many sectors de-rez weapons on entry. The following table shows the point costs associated with various weapons: Type Diffi- Damage Shots Cost cul- ty Pistol 5 5 20 2 Shotgun 6 8 10 3 Chaingun 6 10 20 4 Laser Cannon 5 10 8 5 BFG 6 12 10 6 Rocket 4 10 8 7 Launcher The Rocket Launcher does explosive damage. X14 A Thunderhead Other Bottle of Fire

name: WatchCom
description: An old invention of pop culture, the WatchCom is a communication device disguised as a watch. It is paired with a counterpart and creates a closed, secure channel between the two allowing full video communication within a five-mile radius. Wired

name: Weapons
description: Granted when they complete their first hunt, the Abh-t Dagger is a knife wielded by a Hem-ka Sobk. It is ornately carved but has a rough surface on the flat of other weapons have been enhanced consistently throughout history. This chapter is broken into sections based on what the weapon is: Blades, Defenses, Firearms, and Other. the blade. name: Whispering Stone
description: A small object, usually a stone, shell or crystal that a Nephandus gives to someone as a gift, keying it to them. After some time, it will start to whisper telepath- ically to the person, feeding into their insecurities and self-doubts. It uses one Quintessence a day, and goes silent when it runs out. Memories or Blu-Ray disc). When hooked with special wires to a human brain, it can play video directly into memory, implanting false memories and even overwriting true ones. All that is necessary to use it is to connect the wires to the target and then the Device makes an Arete roll. The memory takes time to implant (at least as much time as is being replaced). To resist, the target may roll Willpower (difficulty 7) against the Device’s Arete on a series of four rolls. Encephalographic Probe

name: Wings of Icarus
description: You can fly! But it might not be the safest option. Flight always comes with risks, and the Wings of Icarus are no exception. By clutching a wooden frame draped with paper wings designed to catch a breeze, the user can hope to fly if they jump off a cliff. This does not always work, however, and requires an Arete roll (and always vulgar) or else the wings don't work, though gravity still will. This also, oddly, seems to never work during the day. A rope is tied to the device and the ground to allow for landing, or else another Arete roll is necessary to do so. Travel tion consists of a collection of Void Ships that may be encountered beyond the Earth. Most are not intended for player ownership and don’t have Background Costs, and those that do are computed via the special systems in Convention Book: Void Engineers. Transit and Communication 121 Mark VII Cassini AUC

name: Wired
description: This simple device is an ear-piece communicator that uses strong encryption for security and can force its way through almost all jamming attempts, As a sec- ondary function, it can pick up sounds in a targeted way: by choosing a location that’s not too far away, the user can listen to what is happening there. Wurnan Stick (Message Stick)

name: Witchward
description: A small object that the mage keeps in their posses- sion to protect them from something. It will provide one of the following: • Panoramic senses Miscellaneous 95 • Instinct for sensing disorder • Life sense • Empathic field • Quintessence flux sensing Other Bilateral Pattern-Fusion Suit

name: Wolf Link
description: a a Some sort of small item, each one is different, that allows the Mage to turn into a wolf when it is worn. It not only physically transforms, but also transforms thought processes, causing the Mage to perfectly mimic a wolf, even when confronted with Werewolves. The Talisman itself blends into the wolf-form when used, but all other possessions of the Mage are left behind. Wolf-Paw Amulet

name: Woodblock of Auspicious Formulae
description: A Himalayan Cedar wood block, two feet to each side and carved with a square mandala. On it is a windhorse surrounded by twelve lines of Tibetan text and eight auspicious symbols. To use it, hemp paper can be laid on the block one a month. The block prints in black ink on the paper, consuming a point of Quintessence. For the next month, a Disciple of Mind may recite the text and meditate on the symbols on the paper. When done, the paper vanishes in harmless white flame, and the Mage gains a temporary rank of the Mind Sphere lasting for the same amount of time spent meditating. Books and Learning 19 20 Mystic Armory Computers Though a young enough technology to not have col- lected very many popular magickal legends, Computers are a core component of many magickal practices. The Virtual Adepts, New World Order and Iteration X are the most obvious users, but Hermetics of House Thig/Verditius, Techno-Shamans among the Dreamspeakers, and many modern members of other Traditions also make significant use of computers as Digital Most technologically inclined Mages end up on the Digital Web eventually. Once there, they find that they often need highly specialized tools to survive and to accomplish their goals. Now, as Sleepers move in and other extensions of Reality are less hospitable than they were in the 90s, more and more equipment spe- cialized for the Digital Web is coming into circulation. Chatter Bomb

name: Wound-Bearing Torc
description: Most commonly torcs, these artifacts also come as pendants, arm bands, belts, rings and other forms. These artifacts absorb the first 10 Health Levels of damage that the Mage takes, and then returns them to the Mage at a rate of one level per day starting the next morning. If it is removed and put on by a new Mage, all the damage is assigned to the new wearer immedi- ately. Created by Verbena specialists, this cord has three knots in it, and each know binds a wind spirit. The first a gentle west wind, the second a strong east wind and the last a furious northern wind. Unbinding a knot releases the spirit and the wind it comes from. Dormancy Tiki

name: X-Ray Glasses
description: The wearer chooses a Pattern that they wish to see and a Correspondence, Life and Matter effect filters all other Patterns out, so they can only see it. Information 51 52 Mystic Armory Internal Most Wonders are objects that a character can pos- sess and own, that they can carry around with them. Unfortunately, this means that they can be stolen as well. This is a certain liability: a lot of effort goes into creating and acquiring Wonders, and if your enemies can just steal them, then that’s a problem. So some Mages create Wonders that cannot be re- moved. Most commonly created by the Technocracy, mystic Mages also create them, usually in the form of tattoos (though a suitably determined enemy may be Biomods Generally created by the Progenitors, biomods are any technological augmentation of a person that changes their biology. Usually this takes the form of genetic engineering, xenografting, etc., though there are a few more basic physical techniques. Bio-Cloaking

name: X117 Death Ray
description: The size of a large machine gun, the X117 is essen- tially a large laser that fires its beam for as long as the trigger is being pulled. It’s too large for an individual human to carry it and needs to be mounted when in use. It does Aggravated Forces damage and costs three Quintessence to use each turn. break the bottle, causing a 10 dice of Aggravated dam- age explosion within a 10 foot radius. When the Paradox the Bottle causes builds up to 10, it is split between all Awakened individuals within 10 feet for a backlash. The Chains of Leviathan

name: X14 A Thunderhead
description: A four-inch-tall red glass bottle with a brass stopper. When unstoppered and turned upside down, the user rolls Arete (difficulty 7). Until the Mage stoppers the bottle again, the fire that pours out spreads at one foot per turn and causes damage to people and objects like a Forces 4 effect. A sufficiently powerful strike will

name: Xenon Bulb
description: A specialized bit of lighting (beyond what a Light Meter can handle) will create a sudden bright flash, blinding and potentially stunning anyone who sees it. The defender must roll Willpower (difficulty 8) or else be stunned for two turns. Yidaki (Didjeridu)

name: Yidaki (Didjeridu)
description: The popular name is often spelled didgeridoo, this instrument is made from a hollow tube, and is tradi- tionally a male only instrument. A trained user in the Australian Outback gets a -3 to all Spirit magick involv- ing the Dreamtime when using it. Even Sleepers, with a Charisma + Performance roll at difficulty 7 may gain the effects of a Sense the Dreamtime rote. Engineering and Materials 39 40 Mystic Armory Information Mages are naturals at acquiring information that is inaccessible to Sleepers. They often make Wonders to help them gather information. These techniques for gathering information run the gamut of styles and belief systems. On top of that, there are techniques for defeating all these information gathering techniques. Bugs and Primarily created by the Technocratic Union to gather information, bugs and drones are either dropped off at a location to take a recording or re- motely piloted there. Either way, they transmit what they see and hear back to the operator. Advanced Bugs

name: Youth Drugs
description: Though the Fountain of Youth itself may be a myth, the Progenitors have worked hard to replicate its sup- posed properties. They have come up with two classes of drugs that will restore youth: • Statis – Properly called “Staticorpidrin,” Statis is named for its primary effect: it causes the body to stop changing. If taken regularly, it halts the aging process, though it does not extend the human lifespan. In fact, long term use may decrease life span, as it is associated with kidney disease and sev- eral other negative side-effects. Withdrawal is even worse, causing tremors, depression and accelerated Life and Nature 73 aging for up to a month. • Quin – “Quinachronodyne” from “quintessence” and “achrono,” Quin is a weekly injection given primarily when someone needs to be bribed to take on a large or extremely difficult task in a hurry. Quin actually reverses aging, but its side effects are significantly stronger than those of Statis. It can on- Boosters Many Wonders are created with the purpose of im- proving the user, making them smarter, stronger or faster. Energy Drinks

name: Z488-C Video Data Retrieval System
description: This Enhancement can return up to 24 hours of vid- eo of anything that the agent sees and hears. This vid- eo can be retrieved by trained technicians back at the base. If the agent dies, however, the video is lost. To start recording, the device’s Arete is rolled. Internal 69 70 Mystic Armory Life and Nature Self-improvement, healing and nature are some of the oldest subjects of magickal thinking. Many systems of magick begin as metaphors for the purification and refinement of the self by altering external things. It is no surprise, then, that there are numerous Wonders designed to handle these problems. Whether ad- dressed through the Science of Biology or the mystical Law of Contagion, there are Wonders that will heal Advanced Not all manipulations of lifeforms are healing or di- rect improvements to their Patterns. Sometimes, more complex things need to be accomplished, which re- quire an advanced and deep understanding of biology. Anti-Gerasone

name: Zelly's Eternal Theatre
description: An elaborate automated theater full of mechanical actors, voice generators and music. Each play is unique, with the wax cylinder that controls it being rewritten as it is used. The plays are five minutes long and prophetic, always hiding their meaning behind symbolism and cryptic clues. Zephraim Pincke's Automata Arcade

name: Zephraim Pincke's Automata Arcade
description: This museum was designed to lure in the nemesis of its creator and have his robots kill the enemy. It con- sists of a sequences of rooms, each of which has a dif- ferent “exhibit”: • Frankenstein and his Monster with a lightning trap, particularly that targets those who confuse Monster and Master • Jacques Etienne addressing the Etherites, with a pit trap that swallows the audience after the speech • Czar Vargo and Etherships firing lasers at anyone who seems Technocratic or hostile • Arno Valiant and his balloon team with poison • Professor Thunder with an animated Tyranno- saurus Rex • Lorenzo Golo transcribing the Kitab al-Alacir with alchemical fire that is only made hotter by water • Sir Simon de Laurent attacking those who don’t know his role in the Society of Ether with a glowing broadsword • Baron Brimstone battling the Garou of the Wild West with his Inferno-gun For more information on Ghosts, see Wraith: The a 20th Oblivion Anniversary Edition. Hiroshima Bone

name: Zulu Warshield
description: A long oval shield of wood-reinforced hide and painted in patterns showing the experiences of the Armor Armor has had a recent resurgent in popular culture, thanks to the popularity of technology-based superhe- roes. This has led the Technocratic Union to reinvest in hardsuits and other high-tech armors as the Con- sensus moves towards them. Of course, the mystics had never stopped enchanting or otherwise making en- hanced armor. Alanson Light Hardsuit
